steps.title: Use the physical context
steps.content: Gogol must "tip his head back" to see a kite high in the sky. The context is a physical movement of the head upward, not a social action or act of creation.

steps.title: Match the movement meaning
steps.content: Choice A means pay money. Choice B means instruct someone. Choice D means create or cause something. None describes the bodily action needed to look up at the kite. The needed meaning is to incline or tilt in a direction. The answer is C.
